Bash(python -B -c "
import os; os.remove\('errors.log'\) if os.path.exists\('errors.log'\) else None
from logger import setup_logging, get_logger
setup_logging\(error_log_file='errors.log'\)
log = get_logger\('test'\)
try:
    raise ValueError\('first error'\)
except BaseException:
    log.error\('something failed', exc_info=True\)
try:
    raise RuntimeError\('second error'\)
except BaseException:
    log.error\('another failure', exc_info=True\)

with open\('errors.log'\) as f:
    print\(f.read\(\)\)
")
